title: Living in Saturday (Easter 2026)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: Hope isn't dead — it's just Saturday. We all know what it feels like to wait so long that you stop hoping. But this message is about one question: is there anyone with a track record good enough to make hope make sense again? We look at Sarah, Abraham, and the resurrection — and the answer is yes. God never broke a promise. Not once. So grab hold of Jesus, because Sunday is coming.
quotes: Without the resurrection, we followed a dead man and called it faith.
Without the resurrection, every funeral where you said 'they're in a better place' — you lied.
Without the resurrection, 2,000 years of faith is the longest wrong answer in history.
